title: Manhunt Pro
description: Minecraft manhunt plugin with pro features for free, works in nether and end too(Best plugin).
body:
#
Manhunt Pro

In Minecraft Manhunt, the speedrunner(s) tries to beat Minecraft before the hunter(s) can kill them. Extra features are added in this plugin, including headstarts, tracker, tab-list and much more. The complete list of features is below.

❤️ Support the Project

Enjoying this resource pack? Your support helps fund future updates, new features, bug fixes, and the development of more Minecraft projects. Every contribution keeps the work alive and growing.

💳 Payment Options

  • PayPal — supports debit/credit cards and Apple Pay.
  • Ko‑fi — quick and easy donations.

This button will safely redirect you to my official support page hosted on GitHub Pages, which is 100% safe.

#
Features
- HeadStart Support - Auto new seed world generation and lobby - GUI: For match setup - Teams: Hunters, Runners, Spectators - Tablist =) - Supports Multiple Runners - Heal and feed players on start(complete player reset) - Clear inventories and reset achievements on start - Nether and End compass tracking support - Team chat to talk with your team members - Win/Loss Messages and Sounds - And many more 🔥

- /manhunt -> Opens manhunt GUI. - /manhunt setLobby -> Sets manhunt lobby. - /manhunt lobby -> Teleports user to manhunt lobby. - /manhunt teams -> This adds player in the selected team. - /manhunt match -> Manhunt match commands - /crewmsg(/cm) -> Changes the mode of chat(Team or Global)

- Permission name: manhunt.setup - There is only one permission which will be by default give only to operators. - Players with this permission can access all the manhunt commands and can destroy and place blocks in lobby world.

1) Download the .jar file 2) Go to your servers plugin's folder and put the plugin in there 3) Restart or start your server
